snippet.title: Who is Graham Norton’s Least Favorite Guest? | WWHL
snippet.description:
Celebrated talk show host Graham Norton names Harvey Weinstein as the worst guest to have graced his iconic stage on the set of The Graham Norton Show. Amidst the candid chat, Graham opens up about his issues with the infamous Hollywood producer, who appeared on his talk show in 2015 alongside Jessie J, David Tennant, and Olivia Colman.

►► Subscribe To WWHL: http://bravo.ly/WWHLSub

Watch WWHL Sunday-Thursday:
WWHL Website: http://www.bravotv.com/watch-what-happens-live
Follow WWHL: https://twitter.com/BravoWWHL
Like WWHL: https://www.facebook.com/WatchWhatHappensLive
WWHL Tumblr: http://bravowwhl.tumblr.com/

'Watch What Happens: Live' is Bravo's late-night, interactive talk show that features guests from the world of entertainment, politics, and pop culture. Hosted by Andy Cohen, the series includes lively debates on everything from fashion, the latest on everyone's favorite Bravolebrities, and what celebrity is making headlines that week. Past guests who have joined Cohen in the Bravo Clubhouse include Sarah Jessica Parker, Tina Fey, Khloe Kardashian, Jennifer Lopez, Liam Neeson, Kelly Ripa, Jimmy Fallon, Anderson Cooper, Jennifer Lawrence, and Lance Bass.

snippet.title: Woman wakes up in the coffin at her funeral #shorts
snippet.description:
An Ecuadorian woman has risen from the 'dead' after almost being buried alive.

Shocking video footage shows the moment 76-year-old Bella Montoya was rescued from her coffin, after being stuck inside for over four hours.

The woman was declared deceased after suffering a stroke in hospital and taken to a local funeral home for preparations.

#BuriedAlive #Ecuador #BellaMontoya #Coffin #10NewsFirst

Atendendo a pedidos, Dra Rosangela Monteiro analisa o caso do momento. O casal Yanny Brena e Rickson Pinto foram encontrados sem vida e de mãos dadas na casa dela, em Juazeiro do Norte, no estado do Ceará. Yanny era vereadora da cidade, e tinha terminado o namoro de anos com Rickson. O que aconteceu, afinal, com os dois? 
#crime #familia #live  #entrevista #podcast #namorados  

Inscreva-se, curta, comente. :)

snippet.title: "Ive beaten boys my entire life" F1 Academy driver Chloe Grant on PITSTOP!
snippet.description:
Formula 1 Academy Driver Chloe Grant on Pitstop Podcast. In todays episode we hear all about Chloe's story into F1 Academy, the finances behind making this all happen & How 17 year old Chloe is inspiring girls all over the world to get into Motorsport. Chloe, thank you so much for joining us on the show, we really appreciate you taking the time to come to London and doing the episode with us. We promise when we have fixed the sim pedals we will do an updated episode haha.

Monza Update: After speaking with Chloe's Family we input the footage of the incident in Monza as Chloe & Lucy wished to share the importance of the Halo. We're so glad to hear Chloe is doing well and can confirm she will be returning for Circuit Paul Ricard at the end of the month. 

Get behind Chloe here - https://www.instagram.com/chloegrantracing

Big thank you to Chloe, Dad & Lucy for all bringing this episode together.

LIKE & SUBSCRIBE FOR MANY MORE GUESTS!

THE PITSTOP PODCAST (2 EPISODES A WEEK + GUEST EPISODES)
Every Monday and Thursday you can find us here - https://linktr.ee/PitstopPodcast 

Contact - natalie.amos@gleamfutures.com

0:00-1:12 Intro
1:12-6:05 Still in College, Growing up Karting in Scotland 
6:05-6:46 Stepping from Karts to Cars
6:46-8:00 Chloe’s Crash!
8:00-10:42 Is It hard to drive a Single Seater? & The Pitstop Dishwasher strikes again
10:42-17:29 First Season in F1 Academy, Being friends with the whole grid, When will it be on TV?
17:29-23:47 Girls on Track, Should F1 be separate for Boys and Girls? Funding a Season
23:47-29:02 How often do you get to test the car? Passing Driving Test, F1 Academy Cars are Mini F1 Cars!
29:02-32:00 PITSTOP FASTEST LAP! 
32:00-34:39 Managed by my sister! If you weren’t racing, what would you be doing? Outro

#ChloeGrant #F1ACADEMY #Formula1 #F1 #GirlsOnTrack #Pitstop #PitstopPodcast

snippet.title: The Evolution of Randy Orton🤯🤯#shorts
snippet.description:
🔥 Join us on a fascinating journey through the life and career of Randy Orton, as we follow him through the years, from a young wrestler to a seasoned veteran! The Evolution of Randy Orton

👦 Early Days:
Step back in time to the early years of Randy Orton's wrestling career. Watch as a young and promising talent enters the ring and begins his journey to becoming a household name.

🧔 Prime Years:
As Randy Orton enters his prime, witness his evolution into one of the WWE's top superstars. Follow the rise of the "Viper" as he dominates the wrestling world with his signature moves and charismatic presence.

👨‍🦳 Seasoned Veteran:
As the years go by, Randy Orton continues to adapt and grow in the wrestling industry. Experience his transition from a young sensation to a seasoned veteran, mastering his craft and captivating audiences worldwide.

👴 The Legacy Continues:
Join us as we explore Randy Orton's later years in the wrestling world. Discover how he maintains his status as a respected and revered figure in the industry, passing on his knowledge to the next generation.

🤯 Don't miss this incredible journey through the ages of Randy Orton's career, from a young rookie to a seasoned veteran. Witness his evolution and the lasting impact he's made on the world of professional wrestling! 💪🤼

👉 Subscribe now to stay updated on the stories of wrestling legends and their enduring legacies! 🌟 #randyorton  #wwe #wrestlinglegends
tags: the evolution of randy orton to 2002-2023
